# Implementation Plan: Build Identity & Default Completeness

**Branch**: `015-build-identity` | **Date**: 2026-07-10 | **Spec**: [spec.md](./spec.md)

**Input**: Feature specification from `/specs/015-build-identity/spec.md` (domain DBR/DAC slice 1)

**Note**: Generated by `/speckit-plan`. See `.specify/templates/plan-template.md` for workflow.

## Summary

Evolve the existing Builds domain so a Build’s **identity** is designated synergies (required), optional exotic armor **item**, optional **build-shared** exotic weapon, and optional **build-pinned Super**; concept tags stay filter-only. Enforce **full combat loadout** on the **default** variant (weapons + armor + subclass kit + mods presence). Identity field changes require **confirm in-place** or **fork** (snapshot-cloned variants). Add **derived default names** and **per-class rename uniqueness**. Delivery via API + debug Builds UI; no Bungie equip/DIM/LLM in this feature.

## Technical Context

**Language/Version**: TypeScript 5+, Next.js (App Router)

**Primary Dependencies**: Existing builds stack — Drizzle/SQLite, zod schemas, `buildService` / `variantService` / `resolveVariant`, debug `BuildsDebugPage`

**Storage**: SQLite `.cache/app.db` — nullable exotic armor; new build columns for shared exotic weapon + pinned Super; migrate existing DBs safely

**Testing**: vitest co-located next to services/routes; gate = `npm run gate`

**Target Platform**: Local Next.js dev; signed-in debug verification

**Project Type**: Full-stack Next.js — debug/API-first delivery

**Performance Goals**: Identity confirm/fork and default-loadout validation interactive (&lt;100ms typical for single-build ops, same class as existing attach checks)

**Constraints**: Preserve `NO_SYNERGY`; tags must not trigger identity confirm; non-default variants may be incomplete; out of scope: equip, DIM, artifacts, wishlist pins, fashion equip, class-item intent-lock, soft stats UI, LLM

**Scale/Scope**: 4 user stories; touchpoints: schema/migration, build schemas/services, resolve exotic claims, PATCH identityAction, fork clone, defaultBuildName helper, debug Builds page, contracts/tests

## Constitution Check

*GATE: Must pass before Phase 0 research. Re-check after Phase 1 design.*

- I. Small Testable Increments: **PASS**. US1 (identity fields + optional armor/shared weapon/pinned Super + tags-not-identity) → US2 (default full loadout) → US3 (confirm/fork) → US4 (naming/uniqueness). Each independently testable via API/debug.
- II. Test-First (NON-NEGOTIABLE): **PASS** (plan). Failing tests for `NO_SYNERGY`, optional armor, shared weapon resolve, full-loadout gaps, `IDENTITY_CONFIRM_REQUIRED`, fork isolation, default name omit-missing, per-class uniqueness — before implementation.
- III. Green Commit Checkpoints (NON-NEGOTIABLE): **PASS** (plan). Gate after each user-story checkpoint in `/speckit-tasks`.
- IV. Co-Located Tests: **PASS**. Extend `buildService` / `variantService` / route / resolve tests adjacent to modules; debug form tests if present.
- V. Validation-First External Data: **PASS**. Manifest hashes for exotics still validated at boundary; identity actions validated with zod; no new untrusted external writers in this slice.

**Post-design re-check (Phase 1)**: **PASS**. Research resolved schema/API/fork/naming decisions; data-model and contracts align with FR-001–014. No constitution violations. Complexity Tracking empty.

## Project Structure

### Documentation (this feature)

```text
specs/015-build-identity/
├── plan.md              # This file
├── research.md          # Phase 0
├── data-model.md        # Phase 1
├── quickstart.md        # Phase 1
├── contracts/
│   ├── build-identity-contract.md
│   ├── identity-confirm-fork-contract.md
│   └── default-loadout-naming-contract.md
└── tasks.md             # Phase 2 (/speckit-tasks)
```

### Source Code (repository root)

```text
src/
├── lib/db/
│   ├── schema.ts                 # nullable exotic armor; build exotic weapon; pinned_super
│   └── client.ts                 # migrate existing SQLite
├── lib/builds/
│   ├── schemas.ts                # zod: optional armor, shared weapon, pinnedSuper, identityAction, optional name
│   ├── buildService.ts           # identity detect, confirm/fork, uniqueness, default name
│   ├── variantService.ts         # fork clone / non-default empty OK
│   ├── resolveVariant.ts         # prefer build exotic weapon; assertFullCombatLoadout
│   ├── defaultBuildName.ts       # NEW name segments helper
│   └── *.test.ts
├── app/api/user/builds/
│   ├── route.ts                  # create with optional name/armor
│   └── [id]/route.ts            # PATCH identityAction
└── app/debug/builds/
    └── BuildsDebugPage.tsx       # minimal identity + confirm/fork + naming controls
```

**Structure Decision**: Extend existing single Next.js app builds module; no new package. Contracts document API/debug behavior only.
